reviews.originalComment: Hotel medan Peunayong sangat strategis dekat dengan tempat kuliner dan tempat beli oleh-oleh
reviews.reviewComments: Medan Peunayong Hotel is very strategically located near dining places and souvenir shops.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel ini terlihat biasa aja dr luar... tp pelayanan dan fasilitasnya cukup oke.. Dibanding kelen sewa si merah2 itu.. Sumpah ini bagus
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel looks ordinary from the outside... but the service and facilities are quite good.. Compared to renting that red one.. I swear this is good.

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel is clean, and the service is friendly.
reviews.originalComment:
Hotel nya strategis berada di pusat keramaian dan malam nya ada dijual berbagai macam kuliner. 
Hotel nya bersih, pelayan juga ramah. 
Walopun pesan via online, receptionis tetap melayani dgn ramah dan fasilitas hotel ttap dpt sama, tidak membedakan seperti kejadian di Hotel Siwah, krn pesan online fasilitas hotel dibedakan, dilayani juga oleh petugas yg laki sgt tidak ramah.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is strategically located in the center of the hustle and bustle, and at night, a variety of cuisines are available for sale. The hotel is clean, and the staff is friendly. Even though I booked online, the receptionist still served me warmly, and the hotel facilities remained the same, not differentiating like the incident at Hotel Siwah, where the online booking facilities were different and were served by male staff who were very unfriendly.

Not a bad location n walk to river n food options, but tired n needing renovation. Rooms r big n has AC. WiFi very poor n irregular. Bathrooms stained n very worn. For the price it should hv been better…..

My room was on the second floor, facing the steeet..no soundproofing i could hear everything..also on the interior of the room windows are not light insulated..so when turning off lights..lights from coridor can enter..had to go and turn off all lights outside my room...bathroom sink hose exploded..its a pretty old hotel which needs maintanance...thought i must say..it has some character...bed and and pillows comfy..big room..freindly staff

reviews.originalComment:
Pelayanan baik,fasilitasnya bagus,kerbersihan juga terjaga.
Pokoknya terbaik dan oke!
Mantap!
reviews.reviewComments: Good service, nice facilities, and cleanliness is also maintained. Overall the best and great! Awesome!

reviews.originalComment: Bising, tempat parkir terbatas, fasilitas kamar mandi ada yg rusak blm di ganti
reviews.reviewComments: Noise, limited parking space, some bathroom facilities are damaged and have not been replaced.
